summary: Image Loading Performance Fixes Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Showcase photo endpoints correctly return 301 redirects to /api/images/ WebP paths. Batch migration endpoint (super admin only) verified. Contacts gallery returns URL paths (not base64). Frontend showcase/review pages load correctly with optimized image paths.

minor.issue: Backend sets Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable but Cloudflare/ingress overrides to no-store. ETag and X-Cache: HIT headers are present and working.

showcase_user_photo_lazy_migration.details: GET /api/showcase/user-photo/{user_id} returns 404 for user without photo (expected), would redirect if photo exists

showcase_store_logo_endpoint.details: GET /api/showcase/store-logo/{store_id} endpoint exists and returns appropriate errors

showcase_feedback_photo_endpoint.details: GET /api/showcase/feedback-photo/{feedback_id} endpoint exists and validates ObjectId format

batch_migration_super_admin_only.details: POST /api/images/migrate-all-base64 returns migration stats for super admin (X-User-ID header)

batch_migration_no_header.details: POST /api/images/migrate-all-base64 rejects requests without X-User-ID header

contacts_photos_returns_urls.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos/all returns URL paths (/api/images/...) NOT base64 blobs

image_cache_stats.details: GET /api/images/cache-stats returns cache statistics (items, size_mb, max_mb)

images_served_with_etag.details: Images served with ETag header for browser caching validation

profile_photo_upload_endpoint.details: POST /api/profile/{user_id}/photo endpoint exists and uses image pipeline

showcase_user_api_returns_url_paths.details: GET /api/showcase/user/{user_id} returns photo_url as /api/showcase/... paths, not base64

review_page_loads.details: /review/imos-demo loads with platform links (Google, Yelp, Facebook, DealerRater, Edmunds) and feedback section

review_link_click_handling.details: Frontend code uses window.location.href on web (not Linking.openURL) to avoid popup blockers - verified in code review

showcase_page_uses_optimized_paths.details: /showcase/{user_id} displays 11 images all using /api/showcase/photo/ paths that 301 redirect to WebP

critical_code_review_comments: Lazy-migration pattern implemented correctly: base64 → upload to object storage → set photo_path → redirect to /api/images/
WebP compression at 85% quality, max 1200px width with thumbnail (200x200) and avatar (80x80) generation
In-memory LRU cache (200MB default) warms on upload for instant subsequent requests
ETag-based browser caching works - 304 Not Modified responses available
Review page correctly uses window.location.href for web platform to avoid popup blockers
Super admin check for batch migration uses X-User-ID header and role verification

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly with optimized image paths)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing migrated images from previous batch migration run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image migration pipeline fully functional. Showcase photo endpoints return 301 redirects to WebP images. Batch migration (POST /api/images/migrate-all-base64) requires super admin X-User-ID header. Contact gallery photos/all returns URL paths. Cache-Control headers set by backend but overridden by CDN proxy - ETag caching works. Review page uses window.location.href on web for popup blocker avoidance.
